title: Amtech G4000 50m (165ft) builder's line
features: HIGH VISIBILITY: This 50m (165ft) roll of high visibility, strong and durable polypropylene builder's line has a working load limit of 10kg
GROUND SPIKE: The cord is supplied with plastic spindle / ground spike handle and lock
SIZE CAPACITY: 50 m range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: From the manufacturer Amtech G4000 Builders Line Multi-purpose string ideal for building work With plastic spindle handle and lock About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.
